hero.subtitle: Describe your destination, dates, and budget — we compare hundreds of airlines and hotels and show you the best price in seconds.
hero.placeholder: e.g. Family trip to Istanbul in June, budget $1,500

suggestions.title: Try:
items: Cheapest flight from Riyadh this week

brandStory.title: How GoTripza Works
brandStory.body: Tell us about your trip in plain language — GoTripza reads your request, compares prices across hundreds of verified airlines and hotels, and shows you the optimal choice in your currency. No complexity. No fees.

mockups.title: Search to booking in three steps
mockups.subtitle: Type. Compare. Book.

search.prompt: Where do you want to go?

confirm.title: Booking Confirmed
confirm.wish: Have a great trip — GoTripza is always with you.

ai.title: Search in plain language
ai.desc: Type what you want — no forms, no dropdowns

smart.title: Prices in your currency
smart.desc: No conversions — what you see is what you pay

fast.title: 180+ airlines in one search
fast.desc: We reach the best price across all sources

support.title: Completely free
support.desc: No service fees — we only earn when you book

secure.title: All payment methods
secure.desc: Apple Pay, PayPal, Visa, Mastercard, Klarna

empathy.title: Best available price
empathy.desc: We show real prices from multiple sources — the cheapest is never hidden

simplicity.title: No hidden fees
simplicity.desc: The price you see is the price at the partner site

trust.title: Your privacy protected
trust.desc: We never store or share your personal data

speed.title: Results in 10 seconds
speed.desc: From your first word to full price listings — no waiting

results.loading: Comparing prices across hundreds of sources...

footer.affiliate: GoTripza earns a commission when you book through our partners — at no extra cost to you.

errors.parse: Couldn't understand that — try adding your destination, dates, and number of travelers.
errors.network: Connection lost — check your internet and try again.
